title: eulophidium quadrilobum
intro: Eulophidium quadrilobum, commonly known as the "Four-Lobed Orchid," is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Eulophiidae. It is a rare and exotic plant native to tropical regions, prized for its unique four-lobed lip and vibrant colors. Traditionally, Eulophidium quadrilobum has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, which is said to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and coughs.
